description_long: This object is a compact, glossy black charging case containing a pair of wireless earbuds. The case has a smooth, rounded rectangular shape with a hinged lid that opens to reveal the earbuds seated securely inside. A small LED indicator is visible on the front of the case, likely used to display charging or battery status. The earbuds themselves are ergonomically shaped to fit comfortably in the ear and are nestled in custom-molded slots within the case. The exterior surface is highly reflective, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding or external buttons.
description: A glossy black wireless earbud charging case with a hinged lid and LED indicator, containing two ergonomically shaped earbuds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open case with both earbuds visible and a small LED indicator on the front.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the smooth, rounded exterior and the partially open lid.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the closed, seamless lid of the case with a glossy finish.
description_view_3: Angled side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the case's curvature and reflective surface.
